hae931ddegfd6ag4df1g9406g033f7928c018: Take care. I'll feel better on the roads knowing you're out there somewhere.
h2e3e770eg7c95g47aag98eag6c73818ce47c: I'd have put good coin on you running off into the sunset, but you did it. You stopped the goblins. Thank you.
h33e54300g09e9g475eg9096g04265d800135: All that talk of fighting... you spared us that. Thank you.
hba7e4759gdec5g44e5g9d24gaa9761ee76ab: After that... well, I pity whatever tries us on the road to Baldur's Gate.
h80f9bae9gefc4g4b1aga7cdgb2ecdefbaa3d: I had my doubts, but you came through. Thank you.
hbf430c68g37a3g459bgb255g76c1d116b6b1: The goblins... look so small. Hard to believe I was ever afraid of them.
h0b15a819g83c5g4fb0gbf5bg21650382f260: Leave me alone. I don't want company.
ha680941ag4be1g4e99g8e05g8f4180e3a8f3: Gods, I almost wish they were here. I just want this done.
h49f3a991g0bd8g4607g9b4bgbec85a6d46d3: You again. Just when I thought today couldn't get any worse.
he1b6171dg3007g4fe1g9a9fga16f807f5964: The goblins... do they fight well?
h058431c9gf1ecg4742ga505g5cbda830e444: You... mean that to be comforting, I'm sure.
h64e0abe0gdf24g4f1bgab1dg7381bab947dd: Well enough. But you have what they don't - something to fight for.
h2c31911fg27acg46eag84eag236f706ac4b8: Some of us have more of that than others. I'll just be glad to live out the day.
h401a33b7g27f4g45bcg8ee6g62d83e86e33e: I'm just here for the show. Make it a good one, won't you?
h3cfaa325g9336g4917g9c14gd5bc7c625247: Better than a mob of undisciplined tieflings.
h6903cda8g9426g420bgbd3dg0250d367fe91: Why don't you find your own stretch of wall to die on?
hb1886ddeg7e32g4a68gb029gbae9192ec48c: Like drunk children. Worse than drunk children - you'll be fine.
h797cbf8dgb71ag429egbbfcgfe7780b6d930: Hah! I wish I had your confidence. But... thank you.
ha1d27170g5c91g42c2g908ag8fb5f2d01055: They're a mob. Take heart - you fight with clan beside you.
h49a07085gea95g4f6egbf86g0a17373c40f7: You're right. Blood or not, the people here are family. And I won't let goblins take that away - not again.
hb9ddea02g9981g4968g8c19gc9f66c5f0c59: Nevermind that - focus on the party we're going to have when all this is over.
h77b7c804g8128g420agb94cg19dbe57bacb0: Wrong question. You don't need to fight better than them - you just need to fight harder.
h52675491g3d9bg4bf2g9791gea62dda1fb18: Heh. Damn straight - to the Nine Hells with them. We won't go down without a fight.
hbd00051egde60g4063g9e9cgeb191fb5a3e4: They don't have skill, but numbers and luck can matter more.
h5ca558d2gb2c5g4d1dg83c7g93163cdbab91: Wonderful. I hope you brought both in equal measure.
h3bd832d7ga8f9g4f51g808cgd4e34c1b9678: It doesn't matter. The true opponent is fear - and you've faced it before. Everyone has.
hce4fc000gbea9g4c6agafaagc27949090b02: Heh, that obvious? But you're right. Can't swing a sword if I'm shaking like a leaf.
